sources.label: Voltalia press releases (IR) - latest items are May 20 board change and Apr 23 Q1 turnover; nothing in June 6-9 window
Voltalia Q1 2026 turnover +25% (Apr 23, 2026) - last fundamental datapoint, reiterated 2026-2030 self-financed growth trajectory
Yahoo Finance quote VLTSA.PA - price flat on June 9

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news since June 6 and the stock is dead flat today (0.0%) with YTD -3.6%, so neither new fundamental evidence nor price action changes the scaling-watchlist setup; yesterday's hold at rank 9 stands.
verdicts.bull: Sub-$1.3B, under-owned French renewable developer with Q1 2026 turnover up 25%, ~3.7 GW 2026 capacity target and a slightly negative YTD - the power-bottleneck optionality is unrepriced, so asymmetry is intact.
verdicts.neutral: Pure-play renewable developer whose AI link is indirect (grid electricity supply, not data-center PPAs disclosed); without a named hyperscaler or data-center offtake, it drifts with the European renewables tape.
verdicts.bear: Balance-sheet-heavy developer in a higher-for-longer rate environment; the SPRING transformation and 2028 first-dividend plan signal that self-financed growth is still unproven, and any capacity slippage versus the 3.7 GW target hits the equity hard at this size.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q2 2026 turnover release on July 23, 2026, plus any data-center or corporate PPA announcement that hardens the AI-power link.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Financing strain or project delays forcing a guidance cut on the ~3.7 GW / EUR 210-230M EBITDA 2026 targets.
